article_title: OL Lyonnes sink Wolfsburg in extra time to set up Arsenal showdown in WCL

tweet_text: 🚨 Chelsea drop vice-captain Enzo Fernández for two games after his comments about Real Madrid during international duty. The midfielder will miss the FA Cup quarter-final and a league match. ⚽️❌ #CFC #EnzoFernandez
article_title: Chelsea axe Enzo Fernández for two games after ‘crossing a line’ with Madrid comments

article_title: Millwall leapfrog Boro into second after Coburn double against old club
